problem: Tool re-execution on task retry has no idempotency guard — duplicate payments, emails, trades possible. When a CrewAI task fails and is retried — via max_retry_limit, exception handling, or external re-trigger — any @tool decorated function that already executed runs again. There's no mechanism to detect that a specific tool call already completed. (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
